page_metadata.biotools__summary: SynGenes is a Python class for standardizing Mitochondrial or Chloroplast gene nomenclatures, this class is capable of recognizing and converting the different nomenclature variations into a standardized form.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SynGenes is a Python class for standardizing Mitochondrial or Chloroplast gene nomenclatures, this class is capable of recognizing and converting the different nomenclature variations into a standardized form.
